Stopped by the shop and met with Joey Morales, the owner. Introduced myself as their EasyPay rep and discussed how things have been going with the business. Joey mentioned that business has been very up and down lately — some periods are very busy while others are slow.

During the visit, I reviewed his EasyPay dashboard with him and showed him how to check and review EasyPay leads. Joey mentioned that he recently spoke with Katie, who was very helpful in assisting him with navigating the website.

Joey also shared that they are currently in the process of switching marketing companies for the business. Once that transition is ...

Contact: Andres

Stopped by the Murrieta location and spoke with Andres to discuss financing options. Andres mentioned that due to the location in Murrieta, there is not a significant need for financing at this store. The majority of customers typically pay with cash or credit card.

He shared that their other locations in Riverside and Moreno Valley utilize Snap and American First Finance, as well as Acima. When asked about the limited usage of EasyPay, Andres explained that those lenders offer aggressive spiffs, and they also receive rebates from American First Finance. Because of those incentives, American First Finance is usually their first financing option.

I mentioned that if we can start generating some applications and business through EasyPay, I may be able to help secure a spiff opportunity or an Amazon incentive to help drive engagement.

Visit Type: In-person stop by

Stopped by the shop and met with Anthony. Introduced myself as their new EasyPay representative. Anthony shared that they enjoy using EasyPay and prefer it as their primary financing option. He mentioned they occasionally use Synchrony as well, but EasyPay is typically their first choice when customers need financing.

We discussed current business levels, and Anthony advised that things have been pretty slow for them lately. Despite that, he confirmed that if financing is needed for customers, EasyPay is the option they look to use first.

Anthony was very friendly and receptive during the visit. I provided him with my business card and let him know to reach out if he needs anything or any support with EasyPay.

Next Steps:
Will stay close and continue developing the relationship with Anthony and the merchant to support future EasyPay opportunities.
